1.png.title: The Neon Interceptor
1.png.description: A sleek, low-slung electric supercar with glowing cyan accents parked under the towering neon billboards of Tokyo. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant city lights.

2.png.title: Alpine Velocity
2.png.description: A classic mid-engine Italian sports car in Rosso Corsa red, carving through a tight hairpin turn with the snow-capped Alps in the background.

3.png.title: The Golden Hour Grand Tourer
3.png.description: A sophisticated silver grand tourer cruising along the cliffside at sunset, reflecting the warm orange light of the Pacific coast.

4.png.title: Midnight Le Mans
4.png.description: A high-tech endurance race car with a massive rear wing and yellow-tinted LED headlights captured with long exposure light trails.

5.png.title: Desert Aero
5.png.description: A matte gold hypercar parked on a pristine stretch of desert highway with massive sand dunes and heat shimmer.

6.png.title: The British Heritage
6.png.description: A British racing green lightweight sports car parked in front of an ancient stone cottage in the English countryside.

7.png.title: Cyber-Track Performance
7.png.description: A track-focused monster with a forged carbon-fiber hood attacking the famous Carousel corner at the Nürburgring.

8.png.title: Riviera Elegance
8.png.description: A white convertible supercar idling in front of the Casino de Monte-Carlo, surrounded by palm trees and luxury architecture.

9.png.title: Scandinavian Precision
9.png.description: A deep blue hypercar with dihedral doors parked on a scenic bridge over the crashing waves of the North Sea.

10.png.title: The Muscle Legend
10.png.description: A wide-body modern American muscle car performing a burnout on a historic stretch of Route 66 at midday.
